title: Retail Sales Executive (Furniture & Beddings)
description:
About Gain City

At Gain City, we deliver expertise and quality solutions in air-conditioning, home appliances and consumer electronics. Established in 1981, Gain City is a trusted household name in Singapore. We take pride in our strong customer focus, innovative spirit, and commitment to service excellence. With a dynamic workforce and a network of stores and service centres island wide, we offer a vibrant and growth-oriented environment where employees are empowered to thrive, take ownership and make a real impact.


About the Role

We are seeking motivated and customer-oriented Retail Sales Executives to join our growing team.


As a Retail Sales Executive at Gain City, you will be the first point of contact for walk-in customers, providing expert advice and tailored recommendations on our furniture and bedding products. This is a customer-facing role ideal for someone who enjoys interacting with people, building rapport, understands consultative selling and thrives in a fast-paced retail environment.


You will conduct product demonstrations, respond to customer queries professionally and work closely with colleagues to deliver exceptional service. Your ability to meet sales targets consistently, stay informed about market trends, and maintain a well-organised sales floor will contribute directly to our store’s success.

As a new employee, you will be eligible for guaranteed commission during your first 3 months.


Key Responsibilities

  • Welcome walk-in customers warmly and proactively engage with them
  • Use a consultative selling approach by understanding customers’ needs and preferences, and offering tailored advice and recommendations
  • Answer customers’ questions in a pleasant and professional manner
  • Demonstrate in-depth knowledge of furniture and bedding products, including their features and benefits
  • Conduct product demonstrations to highlight key features, benefits and unique selling points
  • Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through excellent service and support
  • Work collaboratively with colleagues to deliver outstanding customer service
  • Comply with inventory control procedures and maintain accurate stock counts
  • Keep assigned areas clean, organised and well-presented


Qualifications and Requirements

  • Have a good understanding of sales principles and customer service practices
  • Friendly and energetic personality with a strong customer service focus
  • Good communication skills in English; proficiency in Chinese and/or Malay is an advantage
  • Perform well under pressure and handle customer complaints in a timely and professional manner
  • Meet personal and departmental sales targets on a monthly, quarterly and yearly basis
  • Work retail hours, including weekends and public holidays
  • Willing to attend company-sponsored PWM and OPW training
  • Have a keen interest in home furnishing and decoration; prior knowledge is a plus
  • Relevant experience in selling furniture and bedding products is a plus


What We Offer

At Gain City, we are committed to the growth and development of our employees. You will be offered various learning and development opportunities and a collaborative, forward-thinking and growth-focused work environment to thrive in your career. You will also receive a comprehensive benefits package.


Join Our Team

If you are passionate about sales, thrive in a dynamic retail environment and are a self-motivated individual with strong interpersonal skills, apply now to be a part of our growing team!


Note

Work location: You may walk in for an interview

  • 71 Sungei Kadut Drive, S(729577): Free shuttle bus from Chua Chu Kang & Yew Tee MRT Stations

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified

postedCompany.description:
GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD

Looking for a challenging and rewarding career in a fast paced organization? Join Gain City!


Established in 1981, Gain City is one of Singapore‘s leading retail brand carrying a wide range of quality air-conditioners, home appliances, audio visual equipment, digital and IT products. It is a multi-faceted organisation with distinctive track records in retail and wholesales operations, manufacturing, maintenance and repair, commercial, industrial and residential projects, import and export.
 

Gain City the leading home-grown appliances and electronic retail store is also proud to be the recipient of the prestigious Enterprise 50 Award (5 times), Singapore Prestige Brand Award 2011 (Winner, SPBA-Heritage Brand). Gain City has also previously awarded other celebrated award such as the ISO 9001-2000 Certification, Super Brand (2004,2005,2006,2008 & 2009) and Singapore Promising Brand Award (2006).
